data.content: Removed the Type and Action columns from the Active beats view by suppressing those columns when showAgentColumns is enabled. Added regression coverage in beat-columns helper tests. Validation in worktree work/foolery-3715: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Commit a46ff997e24c pushed to origin/work/foolery-3715.
